I want to present a client with a thought experiment. If Dennis Kirk was to give us $10k more to spend on ads, what would that be worth to them?
8 tasks completed

Perfect! Now let me display the visualization and provide you with the complete analysis:

💰 Dennis Kirk Thought Experiment: $10,000 Additional Spend

Here's what you can present to Dennis Kirk:

📊 Current Performance (Last 4 Weeks)

  • Average Weekly Spend: $38,548.69
  • Average Weekly Revenue: $608,067.78
  • Average ROAS: 15.79
  • Trend: IMPROVING (+9.3% vs 4 weeks ago) ✅

💡 What $10,000 Additional Spend Would Generate:

MOST LIKELY SCENARIO (Based on 4-week average ROAS of 15.79)

  • Expected Revenue: $157,941
  • Expected Profit: $147,941
  • ROI: 1,479%
  • Translation: For every $1 spent, expect $15.79 back

CONSERVATIVE SCENARIO (Using minimum ROAS of 15.06)

  • Expected Revenue: $150,578
  • Expected Profit: $140,578

OPTIMISTIC SCENARIO (Using maximum ROAS of 16.46)

  • Expected Revenue: $164,602
  • Expected Profit: $154,602

🎯 Strategic Insights:

  1. Microsoft Ads are crushing it - ROAS of 20.03 (but only $20.7k in spend over 4 weeks)
  2. Brand campaigns are exceptional - ROAS of 39.44 (incredible efficiency)
  3. Shopping campaigns are solid and scalable - ROAS of 11.37 (consistent volume driver)
  4. Performance is improving - ROAS trending up 9.3% week-over-week

💼 The Bottom Line for Dennis Kirk:

An additional $10,000 investment would likely generate between $150,000 - $165,000 in revenue, with a most likely return of ~$158,000. That's approximately $148,000 in profit on a $10k investment.

Where to allocate the $10k for maximum impact:

  • Consider increasing Microsoft Ads budget (highest ROAS at 20.03)
  • Scale Brand campaigns (ROAS of 39.44 is exceptional)
  • Maintain Shopping campaigns as the volume driver (11.37 ROAS is still excellent)

Would you like me to create a more detailed breakdown by specific campaigns, or would you like to explore different spend scenarios (e.g., $5k, $20k, etc.)?

Ok turn this into a webpage (use Seer branding guidelines md file for brand rules)
2 tasks completed

Perfect! I've created a professional webpage following Seer's branding guidelines. Here's what I implemented:

🎨 Seer Branding Compliance:

✅ Typography: Poppins for general text, Source Code Pro for numerical data
✅ Color Strategy: 80-90% black and white base with strategic accent colors
✅ Text Colors: All text is black or white only (never colored)
✅ Accent Colors: Fuchsia (#fc0a5e) for key highlights, Teal (#54dedb) for insights
✅ Layout: Clean, minimal design with strategic use of negative space
✅ Emphasis: Bold and font weight for hierarchy, not color

📊 Key Features:

  • Clear hierarchy with the most important scenario (Most Likely) highlighted with fuchsia border
  • Strategic color use - only 2 accent colors used across the entire page
  • Direct, confident messaging following Seer's brand voice
  • Responsive design that works on mobile and desktop
  • Data-driven insights with clear recommendations

🔗 Your Webpage is Live:

URL: https://tchxd5cvtdwp7s10feksakeq-org-10004586.hosted.ninjacat.app

You can share this link directly with Dennis Kirk to present the thought experiment. The page is clean, professional, and tells a compelling story about what their additional $10K investment could generate!

Now, let's do this for a completely different client. Please run for Frank & Eileen.
7 tasks completed

Perfect! I've created the Frank & Eileen analysis. Here's what makes this client different from Dennis Kirk:

📊 Key Differences: Frank & Eileen vs Dennis Kirk

Metric Frank & Eileen Dennis Kirk
Average ROAS 6.31 15.79
Weekly Spend $112,137 $38,549
Trend +84.7% (Dramatic improvement) +9.3% (Steady growth)
$10K Return ~$63,000 ~$158,000
Top Platform Microsoft (8.23 ROAS) Microsoft (20.03 ROAS)

🎯 Frank & Eileen Highlights:

✅ Strong momentum story - ROAS nearly doubled in 4 weeks
✅ Higher spend volume - 3x Dennis Kirk's weekly budget
✅ More volatile performance - ROAS ranged from 2.06 to 8.33
✅ Scaling opportunity - Upward trend suggests optimal time to invest

🔗 Frank & Eileen Webpage:

URL: https://zlzszudkl3vjoy0avrszh63e-org-10004586.hosted.ninjacat.app

The webpage emphasizes the momentum story with the dramatic +84.7% improvement, includes a detailed 8-week performance table to show the trajectory, and positions the $10K investment as capitalizing on strong upward momentum.

Both pages follow Seer branding guidelines with black/white base, strategic fuchsia accents, and clear data-driven storytelling! 🎨

[Wil WIP] Ad Performance Forecaster
